Package recoder.kit.pattern

Class Property

java.lang.Object
recoder.kit.pattern.Property
All Implemented Interfaces:
DesignPattern, ModelElement
public class Property extends Object implements DesignPattern
Creates JavaBean compliant setter/getter access methods.

Wishlist: - should always make the field private - options for setter/getter for visibility modifier; usually getter should be more public that setter - option to allow insertion of NullPointerException for non-primitive types - option to forbid creation of indexed property methods - create entries for manifest
